title: Issues

blockedNotice.single: Work on this issue is blocked by the linked issue until it is complete.
blockedNotice.multiple: Work on this issue is blocked by the linked issues until they are complete.
blockedNotice.stalled_one: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blocker}}, but the chain is stalled in review without a clear next step. Resolve the stalled review below or remove it as a blocker.
blockedNotice.stalled_other: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blocker}}, but the chain is stalled in review without a clear next step. Resolve the stalled reviews below or remove them as blockers.
blockedNotice.waiting_one: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blocker}} until it is complete. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.
blockedNotice.waiting_other: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blocker}} until they are complete. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.
blockedNotice.noBlockers: Work on this issue is blocked until it is moved back to todo. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.

selectCompany: Select a company to view issues.

pausedSubtree.executionHeld: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.
pausedSubtree.pausedByAncestor: This issue is paused by ancestor
pausedSubtree.resumeFromRoot: Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.

modeHelp.pause: Pause active execution in this issue subtree until an explicit resume.
modeHelp.resume: Release the active subtree pause hold so held work can continue.
modeHelp.cancel: Cancel non-terminal issues in this subtree and stop queued/running work where possible.
modeHelp.restore: Restore issues cancelled by this subtree operation so work can resume.

subtreeControl.cancelWarning: Cancelling a subtree is destructive. Non-terminal issues will be marked cancelled, and running or queued work will be interrupted where possible.
subtreeControl.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
subtreeControl.wakeAgentsNone: No assigned agents are eligible to wake from this preview.
subtreeControl.wakeAgentsHelp: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
subtreeControl.cancelConfirm: I understand this will cancel {{count}} issues.

errors.unableToCancel: Unable to cancel the queued comment
errors.unableToInterrupt: Unable to interrupt the active run
errors.unableToArchive: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox

toasts.interruptRequestedBody: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.
toasts.queuedCommentRestoredBody: The queued message was restored to the composer.
toasts.feedbackSavedSharing: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
toasts.feedbackSavedLocal: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local
